cityDNA.coreFantasy: A vampiric desert-gothic city where black-market signals, ancestor vaults, cipher halls, containment keeps, opera courts, bone-white high courts, and roseglass rites make secrecy ceremonial.
cityDNA.readerTakeaway: Vel Mouraine is not a generic vampire castle; the uploaded images show a full civic city of veiled markets, necropolis memory, intelligence work, containment law, and theater patronage.
cityDNA.civilizationThesis: Vel Mouraine turns secrecy, ceremony, ancestor memory, dossiers, custody, performance, and controlled hidden exchange into vampiric governance.
cityDNA.visualIdentity: Bone-white civic stone, black spires, roseglass glow, blue-violet lamps, veiled arcades, ancestor vaults, cipher towers, containment yards, opera courts, and pale monumental terraces.
cityDNA.culturalIdentity: Vampiric civic culture organized around etiquette, surveillance, memory, custody, patronage, and beautiful threat.
cityDNA.symbolicIdentity: Red veils, roseglass, bone-white ceremony, black-market beacons, ancestor masks, cipher halls, mist veils, and opera masks symbolize power hidden in elegance.

canonLocks: Vel Mouraine is a mature vampiric civic city, not a generic vampire castle.
The Wonder is Vampiric Roseglass Court of the Red Veil.
The Beacon is Black Market Arcade Beacon.
The Seat of Power is Bone White Ceremony Veiled High Court.
The five primary districts are Underworld / Hidden Economy, Necropolis / Ancestor Quarter, Security / Intelligence, Prison / Containment, and Entertainment / Theater.

Exact uploaded anchors include Underworld / Hidden Economy Civic Hall, Black Market Arcade Beacon, Mist Veils Monument, Understreet Vault Nook, Necropolis / Ancestor Quarter Civic Hall, Ancestor Vault, Ancestor Masks Monument, Bone Lantern Path Nook, Security / Intelligence Hall, Cipher Hall, Mist Veils Monument, Dossier Vault Nook, Prison / Containment Civic Hall, Containment Keep, Judgment Yard Nook, Entertainment / Theater Civic Hall, Opera Court, Entertainment Theater Lantern Monument, and Mask Pavilion Nook.
provisionalCanon: Vel Mouraine's highest civic virtue is controlled revelation.
cautionFlags: Preserve exact uploaded sidecar anchor names.
Keep intelligence and theater distinct from necropolis and hidden economy.

environment.environmentalLogic: Dry monumental space, veiled routes, and public terraces make secrecy spatial and ceremonial.

forms: Vampiric Roseglass Court of the Red Veil
Bone White Ceremony Veiled High Court
skyline: cipher halls, vaults, containment keep, and opera court layered through pale city stone

civilization.people: Vampiric citizens move with social control, ceremony, and careful observation; public life is theatrical even when administrative.
civilization.governance: Bone White Ceremony Veiled High Court governs through ceremony, dossiers, debt, custody, records, and patronage.
civilization.religion: Ancestor vaults, bone lanterns, roseglass rites, and red-veil ceremonies make undeath a formal public continuum.

streets.appearance: Pale monumental streets alternate between veiled arcades, ancestor vault paths, cipher offices, containment courts, and opera approaches under blue-violet lamps and roseglass glare.
streets.movement: Movement follows veiled market routes, necropolis paths, intelligence corridors, containment approaches, and theater courts.
streets.lighting: Roseglass red, bone-white reflection, and blue-violet civic lamps divide district identities.
streets.weatherEffects: Heat, dust, and night cool make shade, veils, and interior courts important.
streets.dayCycle: Court, archive, intelligence, and containment business dominate daytime.
streets.nightCycle: Opera, veiled markets, ancestor lamps, and private hearings dominate night.

housing.wealthy: Roseglass balconies, sealed rooms, and private theater boxes near high courts and opera routes.
housing.middle: Archive, intelligence, and theater households along veiled civic streets.
housing.poor: Service housing in shadowed lanes near markets, containment, and work routes.

districts.name: Underworld / Hidden Economy
districts.civicPurpose: Hidden exchange, debt leverage, signal identity, and survival routes.
districts.visualIdentity: Underworld / Hidden Economy Civic Hall, Black Market Arcade Beacon, Mist Veils Monument, Understreet Vault Nook.

districts.name: Necropolis / Ancestor Quarter
districts.civicPurpose: Ancestor memory, funerary status, and public continuity.
districts.visualIdentity: Necropolis / Ancestor Quarter Civic Hall, Ancestor Vault, Ancestor Masks Monument, Bone Lantern Path Nook.

districts.name: Security / Intelligence
districts.civicPurpose: Information control, dossiers, watch systems, and quiet enforcement.
districts.visualIdentity: Security / Intelligence Hall, Cipher Hall, Mist Veils Monument, Dossier Vault Nook.

districts.name: Prison / Containment
districts.civicPurpose: Custody, judgment, and dangerous persons under ritual law.
districts.visualIdentity: Prison / Containment Civic Hall, Containment Keep, Mist Veils Monument, Judgment Yard Nook.

districts.name: Entertainment / Theater
districts.civicPurpose: Performance, patronage, public release, and political theater.
districts.visualIdentity: Entertainment / Theater Civic Hall, Opera Court, Entertainment Theater Lantern Monument, Mask Pavilion Nook.

wonder.name: Vampiric Roseglass Court of the Red Veil
wonder.symbolicRole: Beauty, blood, etiquette, secrecy, and public performance made monumental.
wonder.visualRole: Roseglass court glowing above pale terraces and veiled streets.
wonder.civicRole: Citywide ceremonies, patronage rites, public spectacles, and house diplomacy.
storyHooks: A red veil falls at the wrong moment and reveals the actual court.

beacon.name: Black Market Arcade Beacon
beacon.symbolicRole: The hidden economy as public nervous system.
beacon.visualRole: Beacon rising from veiled market arcades and vault routes.
beacon.civicRole: Coordinates unofficial response, court fear, and district rumors.
storyHooks: When the beacon changes, the honest city waits for the dishonest one to move.

seatOfPower.name: Bone White Ceremony Veiled High Court
seatOfPower.symbolicRole: Funerary etiquette and hidden authority made government.
seatOfPower.visualRole: Bone-white court with veils, terraces, sealed chambers, and ceremony platforms.
seatOfPower.civicRole: Governs dossiers, custody, debt, performance, and ancestral legitimacy.
storyHooks: A perfect ceremony exposes a false identity.

majorLandmarks.name: Ancestor Vault
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Ancestor Vault, Ancestor Masks Monument, Bone Lantern Path Nook.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Ancestor memory, funerary status, and public continuity.
storyHooks: An ancestor mask identifies the wrong heir.

majorLandmarks.name: Cipher Hall
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Security / Intelligence Hall, Cipher Hall, Mist Veils Monument, Dossier Vault Nook.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Information control, dossiers, watch systems, and quiet enforcement.
storyHooks: A dossier vault keeps the version the court cannot perform.

majorLandmarks.name: Containment Keep
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Containment Keep, Mist Veils Monument, Judgment Yard Nook.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Custody, judgment, and dangerous persons under ritual law.
storyHooks: A judgment yard record proves mercy wore a terrifying mask.

majorLandmarks.name: Opera Court
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Opera Court, Entertainment Theater Lantern Monument, Mask Pavilion Nook.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Performance, patronage, public release, and political theater.
storyHooks: A mask pavilion makes private leverage public.
